positive: A maximalist, vintage botanical pattern featuring exotic tropical flowers, jungle leaves, and whimsical hidden fauna like colorful hummingbirds and butterflies. The style should emulate sophisticated Art Nouveau mixed with psychedelic pop art, using deep jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, magenta, and gold accents) set against a creamy off-white or dark slate background. Composition must be highly dense, symmetrical, and border-to-border suitable for repeating apparel textile prints. Strong contrast, clean linework, detailed engraving quality, photorealistic rendering.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, solid color, boring, simple, childish, cartoonish
